rationale: The two papers share a marketing–finance outcome focus (both model shareholder value using Tobin’s q), so the 2010 article could plausibly be cited as a performance-measure or conceptual precedent rather than a purely unrelated mention. However, the provided match evidence is only a single DOI reference with no in-text citation context or reference text, and the citing paper’s core contribution (TMSE mobility networks) is different from satisfaction heterogeneity. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop, but importance is not clearly established.
